codeReview.summary: The reviewed implementation is consistent with the feature scope: transcript evidence shows multi-viewport visual QA (1440/1200/375), computed-style checks for key layout invariants, and no unaddressed regressions in the touched commit context. The referenced commit change in `web/components/nav.tsx` aligns with the navbar assertions (color-only active state and opaque background) and does not introduce blocking correctness issues.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The frontend-worker skill procedure currently requires both typecheck and lint for every run, but this visual QA-only feature completed with typecheck + browser assertions and still reported `followedProcedure: true`. The skill should explicitly allow verification-only runs where no code changes are made.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/frontend-worker/SKILL.md:49-51 require both `pnpm typecheck` and `pnpm lint`; handoff shows only typecheck in commandsRun and `followedProcedure: true` (/Users/maxmohammadi/.factory/missions/79476079-9b4c-40cb-b69e-9e85801c6056/handoffs/2026-04-01T08-41-18-719Z__visual-coherence-check__8635483a-eaf0-4551-8b89-46c9d5ea1890.json:100-103).

sharedStateObservations.observation: The configured web healthcheck may give false negatives in this environment because it expects HTTP success at `/`, while the handoff documents Turbopack returning HTTP 404 to curl even when browser rendering works.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/services.yaml:42 uses `curl -sf http://localhost:3102`; handoff documents pre-existing `HTTP 404` via curl for root with browser still functional (/Users/maxmohammadi/.factory/missions/79476079-9b4c-40cb-b69e-9e85801c6056/handoffs/2026-04-01T08-41-18-719Z__visual-coherence-check__8635483a-eaf0-4551-8b89-46c9d5ea1890.json:90).

summary: Review passed. The feature’s visual coherence verification is adequately evidenced in the transcript/handoff and no blocking regressions were identified in the associated commit context; two shared-state/process observations were recorded.
